title: setProperty()
text: setProperty() Sets the specified widget property to a given value. Return = Object . setProperty ( PropertyName , Value ) Arguments PropertyName Name of the widget property. Return Value Return New value for the specified widget property. Exceptions The following exceptions may be thrown: uniface.InvalidDataObjectException Description The initial values of the widget properties of a component, entity, occurrence, or field can be set declaratively in the Properties Inspector, and procedurally in ProcScript using the following commands: For components: $componentproperties and $instanceproperties For entities: $entityproperties and $curentproperties For occurrences: $occproperties For fields: $properties and $fieldproperties Once the DSP is loaded, the values of these properties can be dynamically changed in the browser using the setProperty and setProperties API functions. You can use the clearProperties function to reset all the widget properties of the object to their initial values. Example: Using setProperty In the following example, setProperty is used to set the HTML property display to none , thereby hiding the field. Explain this code webtrigger detail ; for field HIDE scope endscope javascript this.getParent().getField("MYFIELD").setProperty("style:display", "none"); endjavascript end Copy Related Links uniface.InvalidDataObjectException Exception thrown if the object on which the function is called is no longer valid. Widgets for Dynamic Server Pages Widget definitions for Dynamic Server Pages (DSPs) are used to generate the HTML elements and controls used to represent fields, labels, occurrences, and entities displayed in the client browser. clearProperty() Restores the initial value of the specified property. getProperty() Returns the value of a property of this Uniface data object. setProperties() Sets widget properties for a Uniface data object in JavaScript. $properties Return or set the current widget properties of a field. $fieldproperties Return or set the current widget properties of an instance of a field. uniface.Entity The uniface.Entity object provides access to selected properties of the component entity that it represents. It is returned by the getEntities and getEntity functions of the uniface.Instance and uniface.Occurrence objects. uniface.Occurrence The uniface.Occurrence object provides access to selected properties of the occurrence that it represents. It is returned by the getOccurrence function of the uniface.Entity object. uniface.Field The uniface.Field object provides access to selected properties of the field that it represents. It is returned by the getField function of uniface.Occurrence. $componentproperties Return or set the definition-time widget properties of the current component instance. $instanceproperties Return or set the current runtime widget properties of current instance.
